transliteration: Amurrum-mā kà-ru-Amurrum kà-ni-ia-mā a--na aa-qí-il<gap> da-tim aí-ip-ri-ni kà-ar kà-ar-mā u wa-bar-ra-tim qí-bi„-mā mup-pu-Amurrum aa a--lim{ki} i--li-kam
i--na mup-pī-im aa a--lim{ki} ia-tù u„-mì-im a--nim mā-mā-an amuttum i--aa-u-mu-ni i--na né-mì-lim da-aùr u-lā e-WA ia-ra-tí-au kà-ru-Amurrum kà-ni-ia i--lā-qé

kī(ma)-mā mup-pī-ni ta-áa-me-a--ni a--mā-kam lu a--na aí-mì-im a--na ekallū-lim i--dí-in lu té-ra-at ekallū-lim u-kà-lim lu na-aí-mā a--dí-ni lā i--dí-in mā-lā amuttum na-áa-u ni-bi„-it a--aí-im au-Amurrum-au u au-mì a--bi„-au i--na mup-pī-im lu-up-ta-nim-mā ia-tí aí-ip-ri-ni aé-bi„-lā-nim
me-+e-er mup-pī-ni a--na kà-ar kà-ar-mā u wa-bar-ra-tim aé-bi„-lā amuttum lu a--na tamkār-ru-tim i--dí-in au-mì a--wi-lim lu-up-ta-nim
